headline: Humana Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Humana will release its second-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a low single-digit profit dip.

raw.headline: Humana Earnings Preview: What to Expect
raw.summary: Humana will release its second-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a low single-digit profit dip.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Neutral on Humana, Raises Price Target to $300
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Sarah James   maintains Humana (NYSE:HUM) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $264 to $300.
